question: Archive trigger: an opt-in --archive flag on bench run (regenerate at terminal state) alongside the existing explicit bench serve --bundle for ad-hoc use, always-on archiving for every run, or a post-analyze hook?
author: claude/design

question: Provenance residence: embed {ledger_sha256, ledger_height, bundle_format} in the bundle itself (rendered on the page; still pure file state, determinism preserved), or a sidecar json only? Embedded provenance travels with the file it describes; a sidecar can be separated from it.
author: claude/design

question: Retention shape: content-addressed archive names (bundle.<height>.<head8>.html) with a stable latest pointer — successive heads coexist, unchanged state writes nothing, the harness never deletes — or a single overwritten bundle.html?
author: claude/design
